title: Revert "buildah image should not enable fuse-overlayfs for rootful mode"
body:
This reverts commit 2e25b156f74dfaeb3a44dcad663db1c041a803ef.

that all your commits are signed with `git commit -s`.
-->

Closes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/4715

comments.body: @rhatdan Could you please take a look, it looks like last change broke lot of users.
Why, rootful users should not be defaulting to fuse-overlay?
Rebased @vrothberg @nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat @rhatdan , could we merge this to unblock users in #4715
